note: v390: New Budget section (hideable module). Visual scaffold for now — the month-by-month spend breakdown is real (pulled from expenses, non-reimbursed, with ‹ › month navigation), shown as a hero 'Spent in <month>' total plus a colored per-category bar list ranked by share of spend. Budget TARGETS and spent-vs-budget progress are placeholders (a 'Set a budget' CTA + 'BUDGET — not set' rows) until the budgeting functionality is defined.
